design_philosophy: Functional beauty. CutSync is a precision tool. The UI must reflect technical accuracy, sharp edges, and zero clutter. The password flow is treated as a secure, tactical operation.

typography.headings: Cabinet Grotesk or Outfit (Radical weight contrast: Black vs Light). DO NOT use Inter.
typography.body: IBM Plex Sans (Clean, sterile body text for maximum legibility).
typography.inputs: JetBrains Mono (Used exclusively for password and email inputs to signal technical accuracy and precise keystrokes).

rules: No full-screen gradients. Color is function only.
Hover states must explicitly set text color to maintain contrast.
Do NOT use transparent backgrounds for text-bearing surfaces.

visual_enhancers.borders: Grid Borders (Technical Look). 1px crisp borders on inputs and cards. No soft muddy shadows.
visual_enhancers.corners: Max 4px border-radius for slightly softened brutalism. Inputs can have 0px radius (sharp) to feel more precise.
visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle digital noise overlay (opacity 2-3%) on the main background to break flatness.

password_input.style: bg-transparent border-b-2 border-neutral-800 focus:border-primary px-0 py-3 rounded-none font-mono text-lg transition-colors
password_input.features: Must include an inline eye icon (lucide-react) to toggle visibility. Use 'autocomplete="new-password"' where appropriate.
password_input.interaction: Focus states must be highly visible (e.g., border color shift to Volt Blue, ring-0 to avoid blurry shadows).

strength_checklist.style: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-y-2 gap-x-4 mt-6 p-6 border border-neutral-800 rounded-md bg-[#0A0A0A]
strength_checklist.logic: Real-time updates. Default state: gray text + circle icon. Success state: Signal Green text + checkmark icon. Shared component across Signup/Reset/Change.
strength_checklist.rules: Must include: 8+ characters, 1 uppercase, 1 number, 1 special symbol.

buttons.primary: w-full bg-primary text-white font-bold tracking-wider py-4 hover:bg-primary_hover transition-colors rounded-sm flex justify-center items-center gap-2
buttons.secondary: w-full bg-transparent text-neutral-400 hover:text-white transition-colors text-sm font-medium

alerts_toasts.style: Use Sonner for toasts. Stark black cards with 1px border. Icon + minimal text.
alerts_toasts.usage: Used for 'Email Sent' confirmation, Deep-link token expiration/error, and Password Change Success.

layouts.container: Mobile-first layout constraint. All standalone auth screens (Login, Forgot Request, Reset) must be constrained to 'max-w-md mx-auto'. For desktop, center vertically/horizontally.
layouts.settings_integration: For 'Change Password' in settings, embed the flow within the existing account settings grid layout. Use a dedicated 'Security' section.
layouts.spacing: Generous spacing. Use 'gap-8' between form blocks. Padding inside auth cards should be 'p-8' or 'p-12'.

motion.page_transitions: Staggered vertical fade (Framer Motion). translateY from 10px to 0, opacity 0 to 1. Duration: 0.3s ease-out.
motion.interaction: Haptic-like active states on buttons (scale down to 0.98). Password checklist items animate color change smoothly.
motion.status: When all rules match, subtle flash or scale-up on the submit button to signal readiness.

accessibility.forms: Use 'aria-invalid', 'aria-describedby' for error states. Label everything.
accessibility.checklist: Real-time checklist MUST be read to screen readers using 'aria-live="polite"' and 'role="status"'.
accessibility.contrast: Text contrast must meet APCA minimums.

media.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for UI icons (eye, eye-off, check, x, alert-circle, mail). Minimalist, clean strokes.

instructions_to_main_agent.flow_1_request_reset: Add 'Forgot password?' link on Login Screen (above or below password input). Link leads to Recovery Request Screen: Single email input. Submit triggers 'Email Sent' state.
instructions_to_main_agent.flow_2_deep_link_reset: Create 'Reset Password Screen' deep-linked via URL (e.g., /reset-password?token=...). Handle 'Invalid/Expired Token' error state gracefully. Show New Password and Confirm fields. Block submission until match and checklist are 100%.
instructions_to_main_agent.flow_3_change_password: In authenticated Account Settings, add 'Change Password' section. Requires 'Current Password', 'New Password', and 'Confirm New'. Uses the same shared checklist component.
instructions_to_main_agent.shared_architecture: Build ONE reusable '<PasswordStrengthChecklist />' and ONE '<PasswordInput />' component to be used across all 3 flows (Signup, Reset, Change).
instructions_to_main_agent.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., 'data-testid="forgot-password-link"', 'data-testid="password-checklist-item-length"').

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You MUST NOT apply universal transition (transition: all). Add specific transition targets.
You MUST NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; }). Preserve natural left alignment.
DO NOT use generic centralized layouts with AI slop gradients. Stick to the stark, technical Swiss Brutalism defined here.
Use 2-3x more spacing than usual. Cramped designs look cheap.
NEVER use placeholder text for missing logos or images. Do not use AI emojis (🤖🧠).
Only use Shadcn components as a base, heavily strip their default styles to match the crisp, border-heavy aesthetic.
